articles.title: The Compliance Flow and the Boardroom Are the Same Design Problem
articles.excerpt: Why the most important screen you will ever design is the one your stakeholder never sees, and the conversation they will never admit they need.

articles.title: Thermodynamics of AI: Why You Are Exhausted
articles.excerpt: AI drove the cost of production to zero but the cost of verification stayed the same. The biology is paying the price for the broken physics of work.

articles.title: The Cargo Cult of AI
articles.excerpt: Why prompt libraries are a trap, fluency is the only way out, and we are treating the most fluid technology in history with the rigid bureaucracy of a call center.
